name: groweasy-importer
description: AI-powered CSV importer that maps arbitrary lead CSVs into the GrowEasy CRM schema.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace shared" "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n shared,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace shared" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,magenta "npm run start --workspace backend" "npm run start --workspace frontend"
